Weekly Training Schedule

All classes are open to enrolled members. Not a member yet? Book a free trial and we'll show you around.

Need a Different Time?

We offer private and semi-private lessons by appointment. Perfect for busy schedules or accelerated learning.

Ready to Get on the Mats?

Your first class is completely free — no experience required.

Premier Martial Arts Pines

Premier Martial Arts Pines is Pembroke Pines's premier martial arts academy. We develop champions on and off the mats through world-class instruction and a supportive community.
